question: How many customers do we have?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_customers FROM customers;

question: Show top 5 customers by revenue
expected_sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id=o.customer_id GROUP BY c.id,c.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Orders by status
expected_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status;

question: Customers by region
expected_sql: SELECT region, COUNT(*) FROM customers GROUP BY region;

question: Products by category
expected_sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM products GROUP BY category;

question: Top 10 expensive products
expected_sql: SELECT name,list_price FROM products ORDER BY list_price DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Support tickets by priority
expected_sql: SELECT priority, COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets GROUP BY priority;
